<{%reset%}>    [id=3]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:index:res::target]

<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:index:res::snippet-resource]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    propA: <{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>true<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 1 created<{%reset%}>
    1 unchanged
